commits.message: feat: refund credit for calls under 15 seconds
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: feat: mic permission gate before Vapi calls
commits.author: shalomer

commits.message: fix: match real Chrome macOS mic permission dialog
commits.author: shalombook

panels.title: feat: refund credit for calls under 15 seconds
panels.scene: A medieval peasant is sobbing uncontrollably, clutching a single silver coin. The knight stands beside him, looking perplexed. A large sign reads: '15 seconds or FREE!'

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Fifteen seconds! He values our time!

panels.title: feat: mic permission gate before Vapi calls
panels.scene: A villager kneels before the knight, offering a microphone on a velvet pillow. Behind them, other villagers cheer. The knight looks slightly uncomfortable.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We now have PERMISSION before we speak! The gods are smiling!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It prevents errors in voice calls.

panels.title: fix: match real Chrome macOS mic permission dialog
panels.scene: Two identical-looking stone tablets are displayed side-by-side. One tablet is slightly crooked, and villagers are recoiling in horror. The knight carefully adjusts the crooked tablet. The second tablet has the Chrome logo.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The dialog... it's... perfect! My eyes can rest now!

panels.title: 3 commits. Mic permissions granted. Time valued. Pixels aligned.
panels.scene: The knight is slumped against a stone wall, looking weary. In the background, villagers are erecting a giant golden microphone statue. One villager is carving a pixel into the base of the statue.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall call this day 'Microphone Monday'!
